title: Dodonna (disambiguation)
content:
'''Dodonna''' could refer to:
[[File:JanDodonna-TotOR2023.png|thumb|right|300px|General Jan Dodonna]]
==Canon==
*'''[[Jan Dodonna]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]] [[general]]
*The '''''[[Dodonna's Pride]]''''', a [[CR90 corvette]]

==Legends==
===Individuals===
*'''[[Bevera Dodonna]]''', the [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]] during the [[Galactic War]]
*'''[[Forn Dodonna]]''', a [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]
*'''[[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[General/Legends|general]]
*'''[[Vrad Dodonna]]''', the son of Jan Dodonna and a Rebel [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]

===Starships===
*The '''[[Dodonna (Assault Frigate)|''Dodonna'']]''', an [[Assault Frigate Mark I]]
*The '''[[Dodonna (Galactic-class)|''Dodonna'']]''', a [[Galactic-class battle carrier|''Galactic''-class battle carrier]]
*The '''[[Dodonna's Pride/Legends|''Dodonna's Pride'']]''', a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]]

===Other===
*The '''[[Dodonna family]]'''
*The '''''[[General Dodonna]]''''', a [[USV-5 Modified Landspeeder]]

==Real world==
*"'''[[Dodonna's Story]]'''," a short story by [[Grant S. Boucher]]
